evals.prompt: How do I set up a welcome email automation in Brevo for new subscribers?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to creating a journey in Brevo triggered by contact added to list, with email steps and wait delays

assertions.name: mentions_automation_journeys
assertions.description: Response must mention Brevo's Automation/Journey feature (not Campaigns) for multi-step sequences

assertions.name: includes_trigger_setup
assertions.description: Response must explain setting the trigger to 'Contact added to list' or similar entry point

assertions.name: includes_plan_requirement
assertions.description: Response must note that automation requires Standard plan or higher

evals.prompt: I need to authenticate my domain in Brevo for better deliverability. What DNS records do I need?
evals.expected_output: Guide to adding Brevo code, DKIM, DMARC, and SPF DNS records

assertions.name: mentions_brevo_code
assertions.description: Response must mention the Brevo code TXT record as part of domain authentication

assertions.name: includes_spf_value
assertions.description: Response must include the SPF include value: spf.brevo.com

assertions.name: mentions_dkim_and_dmarc
assertions.description: Response must mention both DKIM and DMARC records as required for full authentication

evals.prompt: How do I send a transactional order confirmation email using the Brevo API?
evals.expected_output: API call example using POST /smtp/email with templateId and params

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Response must reference POST /smtp/email as the endpoint

assertions.name: shows_auth_header
assertions.description: Response must show the api-key header for authentication

assertions.name: uses_template_params
assertions.description: Response must demonstrate using templateId with dynamic params object for order data
